node_kinds.name: Example_Domain
node_kinds.description: Environment node used to group and select Example data in the BloodHound UI.

node_kinds.name: Example_User
node_kinds.description: Standard user account in the Example environment.

node_kinds.name: Example_ServiceAccount
node_kinds.description: Service account that BloodHound should treat as a principal in the Example environment.

node_kinds.name: Example_AdminAccount
node_kinds.description: Privileged account used to demonstrate display kinds and attack path findings.

node_kinds.name: Example_HighValue
node_kinds.description: Secondary classification kind that should not control node styling.

relationship_kinds.name: Example_AdministersDomain
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to administer the example domain.

relationship_kinds.name: Example_ResetPassword
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to reset passwords across privilege boundaries.

remediation.short_description: Review principals that can administer the example domain.
remediation.long_description: This finding appears when a traversable domain administration edge places a principal on an Attack Path in the target environment.
remediation.short_remediation: Limit domain administration rights to approved privileged roles.
remediation.long_remediation: Review delegated domain administration rights, remove unnecessary assignments, and validate the operational workflows that still require this access.

remediation.short_description: Review accounts that can reset passwords across privilege boundaries.
remediation.long_description: This finding appears when a traversable password reset relationship crosses a Privilege Zone boundary in the target environment.
remediation.short_remediation: Restrict password reset permissions to approved administrative roles.
remediation.long_remediation: Review delegated password reset permissions, remove unnecessary assignments, and validate any help desk or automation workflows that still require this access.
